name: Chunky Beef Posole Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds beef shoulder or bottom round stew meat, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
3 tablespoons olive oil, vegetable oil, or lard
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the meat with salt and pepper. In a single layer, sauté in oil until well browned.
2. Remove the meat and set aside. Add onions and jalapeno to the pot and brown until golden.
3. Add the meat back into the pot. Sprinkle with cumin. Stir in chipotle, garlic, tomatoes, grits, and water.
4. Bring to a boil, reduce heat to a simmer. Cook gently for about 1 1/4 hours or until tender.
5. Adjust seasoning as needed. Serve topped with cilantro, scallions, sour cream, and crumbled corn tortillas.
